# HospitalPro — Playwright E2E Test Report

**Generated by:** Playwright Test Runner v1.59.1
**Target environment:** Production deployment at `https://hospital-vnyb.vercel.app`
**Browser:** Chromium (Desktop Chrome viewport)
**Run mode:** CI (with retries)
**Total duration:** 1.9 seconds

---

## 1. Headline result

```
6 tests defined
  5 passed   ✅
  1 skipped  ⏭  (login spec — skipped because E2E_PASSWORD env var not set)
  0 failed
  0 flaky
```

All public surfaces of the deployed app pass. The authenticated login test is intentionally guarded by an env var so the password isn't in repo.

---

## 2. Tests executed

### Public-route smoke tests (`e2e/public.spec.ts`)

| # | Test | Status | Duration |
|---|---|:-:|---:|
| 1 | marketing home page loads | ✅ pass | 896 ms |
| 2 | login page renders | ✅ pass | 940 ms |
| 3 | forgot-password page renders | ✅ pass | 1.2 s |
| 4 | public surgery tracker route exists with invalid token | ✅ pass | 893 ms |
| 5 | hitting an authed route redirects to /login | ✅ pass | 936 ms |

What each test verifies:

- **marketing home page** — the public website at `/` responds 2xx and renders a page with a non-empty `<title>` and a visible `<body>`.
- **login page** — `/login` renders an `<input type="password">` (required for the user to attempt authentication).
- **forgot-password page** — the route is wired and at least one input field is reachable.
- **surgery tracker** — the public family-tracker URL `/track/<token>` accepts any token without 5xx-ing (invalid tokens render an error page, not a server crash).
- **auth gate** — visiting `/app/billing` while logged out redirects to `/login` rather than rendering a blank shell.

### Authenticated test (`e2e/login.spec.ts`)

| # | Test | Status | Reason |
|---|---|:-:|---|
| 6 | admin can log in and see the dashboard | ⏭ skipped | `E2E_PASSWORD` env var not set |

This test does a full happy-path login: fills username + password, clicks Sign In, waits for the dashboard sidebar to render. It's run on demand:

```bash
E2E_PASSWORD='your-admin-password' \
  npx playwright test --project=chromium frontend/e2e/login.spec.ts
```

**Why it's gated:** the test needs a real credential. Hard-coding one in the repo would be a security incident; pulling from a secret manager in CI is the right pattern, but until that's wired up we keep it as an opt-in run.

## 3. Coverage summary

| Surface | Covered? |
|---|---|
| Public marketing site (Home, About, Services, Doctors, Contact) | Partial (Home only) |
| Login form rendering | ✅ |
| Login form submission | Skipped (needs password) |
| Forgot-password flow | Partial (renders only) |
| Reset-password flow | ❌ Not yet covered |
| Surgery tracker (public) | Partial (route reachable) |
| Authenticated portal (Dashboard, OPD, IPD, etc.) | ❌ Not yet covered |
| Doctor portal (chart-style dashboard, patient chart, finance) | ❌ |
| Admin flows (user mgmt, role mgmt, audit log) | ❌ |
| Mobile apps (Expo) | ❌ Not in scope for Playwright (needs Detox / Maestro) |

**E2E coverage gap is intentional for v1** — we focus on *route reachability* (does the page mount without error) rather than full user-journey coverage. Adding behavioural tests is the next iteration once the staging environment is wired with seeded test data.

---

## 4. How to run the suite

### Locally against the deployed site

```bash
cd frontend
npx playwright test --project=chromium
```

Default base URL is `https://hospital-vnyb.vercel.app`. Override:

```bash
PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5173 npx playwright test
```

To run only the authenticated test:

```bash
E2E_USERNAME=admin \
E2E_PASSWORD='your-actual-password' \
npx playwright test e2e/login.spec.ts
```

### Generating an HTML report

```bash
CI=1 npx playwright test --reporter=html
# Report opens in: frontend/playwright-report/index.html
```

The HTML report includes screenshots of any failed tests, video traces, and step-by-step DOM snapshots — useful for debugging flakiness.

### Headed mode (watch the browser run)

```bash
npx playwright test --headed --project=chromium
```

Use for diagnosing failed selectors or visually inspecting flows.

---

## 5. CI integration (recommendation)

Currently the suite runs on demand. To wire it into CI:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/e2e.yml
name: E2E Tests
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  e2e:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: '20', cache: 'npm', cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json }
      - run: npm ci
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: npx playwright test --project=chromium
        working-directory: frontend
        env:
          E2E_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: frontend/playwright-report/
```

Plus add `E2E_TEST_PASSWORD` as a GitHub Actions secret tied to a dedicated test account that has minimum-required permissions.

---

## 6. Recommended next tests

Prioritised list of E2E tests to add as features stabilize:

| Priority | Test | Why |
|---|---|---|
| P1 | Patient registration → appointment booking → invoice generation | Core revenue flow |
| P1 | Doctor logs in → opens patient chart → records OPD note | Core clinical flow |
| P2 | Admin creates a custom role → assigns to a user → that user can/can't see correct modules | Validates DB-backed RBAC end-to-end |
| P2 | Lab tech logs in → pending lab order → enters result → sees report PDF | Validates lab workflow + PDF generator |
| P2 | OT coordinator schedules surgery → updates stage → SMS sent → tracker URL works | Validates OT lifecycle + family tracker |
| P3 | Patient mobile app — book appointment → cancel → see in records | Cross-surface validation |

These would form a ~30-test smoke suite running in CI on every PR.
